paper_title: Phenology and Pollen Germination Studies of Jujube Cultivars

methods.description: Observation of phenological stages of jujube cultivars to understand their growth patterns and timing of developmental stages.

steps.description: Phenology was observed for all cultivars listed in Yao et al. (2015) plus 'Yu' twice per week from mid-April to full bloom, through fruit set and around fruit maturation time each year from 2012 to 2017.
steps.searchable_summary: record phenological stages of jujube cultivars bi-weekly

steps.description: Last frosts were also recorded each spring.
steps.searchable_summary: record last frost dates each spring

methods.description: Study of pollen germination rates of jujube cultivars to assess reproductive success and viability.

steps.description: The pollen germination studies were conducted around the full bloom or late full bloom period from late June to early July from 2012 to 2014.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct pollen germination studies during bloom period

steps.description: Twelve to fifteen same-day bloomed flowers were sampled and stored in Eppendorf tubes and transported to the laboratory in ice.
steps.searchable_summary: sample and store bloomed flowers for lab analysis

steps.description: Cultural media were prepared with 15% sucrose, 0.01% boric acid, and 1% agar, and pH was adjusted to 5.8.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare cultural media for pollen germination

steps.description: For pollen germination tests, 0.35-0.4 mL of media was used per slide and smeared with a glass rod.
steps.searchable_summary: apply media to slides for germination tests

steps.description: Each slide was put into a petri dish with a piece of wet paper towel to buffer the humidity.
steps.searchable_summary: store slides in petri dishes with humidity control

steps.description: After 4-5 h of incubation at 22°C, pollen germination was observed and photographed under a microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: incubate and observe pollen germination under microscope

steps.description: Around 200 pollens were counted for pollen germination rate and abortion rate.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen for germination and abortion rates
